creator: trepan@gmail.com
text:
I've debugged it little bit more and it seems that thread id changes
 in dlopen call. (dlopen is called from Python/dynload_shlib.c:130)
 Firstly it loads _gobject.so, which works fine. After that Python
 tries to load _gtk.so and in that dlopen call thread id changes, which
 later causes deadlock.
